---
title: "Sandbox"
format:
  html:
    html-math-method:
      method: mathjax
      equation-numbering: all
    include-in-header:
      - includes/mathjax-equation-numbering.html
---

This chapter is reserved for exploratory notes, draft diagrams, implementation
sketches, and benchmark-driven documentation that is not yet ready to be folded
into the formal theory chapters.

The intended use is:

- keep work-in-progress material visible in the rendered manual,
- document code-facing conventions before promoting them into the final text,
- collect diagrams and benchmark notes that support later physics sections.

{{< include redesign-notes.qmd >}}

{{< include class-diagram.qmd >}}

{{< include opal-element-bridge.qmd >}}

{{< include element-placing.qmd >}}

{{< include orbit-threader.qmd >}}

{{< include auto-phasing.qmd >}}

{{< include boosted-frame.qmd >}}

{{< include low-energy-pairs-high-energy-coulomb.qmd >}}

{{< include coordinate-system-figures.qmd >}}
